scripts.test: corepack pnpm test:unit && corepack pnpm test:e2e
scripts.test:e2e: corepack pnpm -C packages/heat-sdk build && corepack pnpm exec playwright test
scripts.check:pkg: corepack pnpm -r build && corepack pnpm -r --if-present pack:check
scripts.verify: corepack pnpm format:check && corepack pnpm lint && corepack pnpm typecheck && corepack pnpm build && corepack pnpm test:coverage && corepack pnpm test:e2e && corepack pnpm check:deps && corepack pnpm check:arch && corepack pnpm check:pkg
scripts.verify:non-e2e: corepack pnpm format:check && corepack pnpm lint && corepack pnpm typecheck && corepack pnpm build && corepack pnpm test:coverage && corepack pnpm check:deps && corepack pnpm check:arch && corepack pnpm check:pkg
